description: This map displays an inland water body and its surrounding Area of Interest (AoI), illustrating an amendment to ensure full coverage. The main water body is shown in dark green. A blue outline, labelled "Lake outline (blue) from EU-Hydro database," traces the precise boundary of the water feature. An "old AoI (yellow)" is depicted as a wide, translucent yellow buffer zone surrounding the central parts of the water body. Several discrete, translucent green areas, labelled "new AoI (green)," are positioned at the extremities and narrower branches of the water body, extending coverage beyond the yellow "old AoI." The background is a satellite or aerial image showing a landscape of vegetated or agricultural land. The map demonstrates how the "new AoI" was added to cover sections of the inland water body that were not fully encompassed by the "old AoI," thereby increasing the spatial extension of the Area of Interest.
